web.title: `safe-area-inset-bottom` without `viewport-fit=cover`?
web.description: env(safe-area-inset-bottom) is the CSS constant on Safari iOS that lets you reference the size of the Home Bar on the bottom of the screen.

web.title: How to create a blurry status bar for PWAs on iOS - Daniel Pietzsch
web.description: For the height , use the env(safe-area-inset-top) environment variable, which covers that exact area on iOS at the top behind the status bar.
